creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 194409
svn diff for textproc/tkdiff

Update textproc/tkdiff to version 4.3

Upstream released version 4.3 on 06-06 which, according to
their release notes, is somewhat "major";
  adds features
  polishes current features
  squashes bugs

Changes
  Makefile
  distinfo

svn diff (patch), and QA LOG included.

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
